overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront promenade at dusk, featuring neon-lit pathways, towering glass skyscrapers, and pedestrian NPCs. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showing the transition from Corpo Plaza to Vista del Rey along a curved canal walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with neon edge lighting

events.description: first pedestrian NPC approaches and passes the camera
second pedestrian NPC passes by wearing dark hooded clothing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved bridge pathway with purple illuminated markers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and shorts walking toward camera
pedestrian in dark hooded outfit walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with vertical teal accent lighting and illuminated windows
calm water canal running parallel to the walkway with concrete embankment
blue painted safety railing with horizontal bars along the water edge
small orange rectangular building or service kiosk with flat roof
large elevated concrete highway or transit structure spanning the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic waterfront promenade at dusk, walking toward a massive glass skyscraper. The pathway features purple illuminated markers and blue railings along the canal. Two pedestrians pass by walking in the opposite direction as the camera moves forward along the curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront walkway under building overhang

events.description: location text 'CORPO PLAZA' appears in the lower left corner

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved path, passing under the cantilevered building overhang

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking away from camera along the path

entered.detail: large industrial yellow pipeline bridge spanning across the waterway
cantilevered section of the skyscraper creating partial cover over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera curves left along the waterfront, passing beneath an overhanging building section. The yellow industrial pipeline structure becomes prominent across the water. The location 'Corpo Plaza' appears on screen as the path continues under the shadow of the mega-tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza entrance with vending machines and pedestrian activity

events.description: location text 'VISTA DEL REY' appears in the lower left corner
camera turns right at the vending machine corner onto the main promenade

agents.ego_description: approaching the vending machine area and executing a right turn onto the tree-lined promenade

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking along the path ahead
child pedestrian running ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: cluster of purple and pink automated vending machines with illuminated displays
row of colorful recycling containers with labels
mature tree with dense green canopy and thick trunk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza area as 'Vista del Rey' appears on screen. The camera approaches a cluster of purple vending machines and recycling bins, then turns right onto a promenade with more pedestrian activity. The mega-tower shifts to the left background as the canal now runs along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade with seating and street furniture

events.description: passing the vending machine cluster and entering the tree-lined seating area

agents.ego_description: walking past the vending machines and continuing along the promenade with benches and planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on orange bench looking at device
pedestrian in gray clothing walking away from camera

entered.detail: rectangular concrete planter with integrated seating and spiky plants
red and white striped construction barrier with warning lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the promenade past the vending machines, featuring concrete planter benches and construction barriers on the left. The large plaza trees line the right side as pedestrians sit on benches or walk along the path. The camera maintains a steady walking pace through this urban park-like setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from the shadow of a corporate mega-tower into a wide, open urban plaza. It begins by moving toward a massive glass skyscraper along a curved canal path marked by purple lights and blue railings, passing pedestrians under the dim light of dusk. As the camera curves left, it glides beneath an overhanging building section and passes a prominent yellow industrial pipeline across the water. The scene then opens into the expansive Vista del Rey plaza, shifting past purple vending machines and recycling bins as the mega-tower recedes into the left background. Finally, the path leads through a park-like setting lined with concrete planter benches, construction barriers, and large plaza trees where pedestrians relax along the walkway.
